prompt: Make a 32x32 pixel art mushroom — red cap with white dots, Super Mario style. Save as mushroom.svg

assertions.text: An SVG file named mushroom.svg exists in the outputs directory
assertions.name: svg_file_exists

assertions.text: The SVG contains red colors for the cap (e.g. #cc0000, #ff0000, #e00000, or similar)
assertions.name: red_cap_colors

assertions.text: The SVG contains white or near-white colors for dots (#ffffff, #f0f0f0, or similar)
assertions.name: white_dot_colors

assertions.text: The pixel grid is exactly 32x32 (coordinates span 0-31 in both axes)
assertions.name: correct_canvas_size

assertions.text: The SVG contains shape-rendering='crispEdges' for pixel-perfect rendering
assertions.name: crispedges_attribute
